raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Friendship Park Border Wall Project falls within the definition of being a waste of American taxpayer dollars.",
    "Friendship Park has served as a binational meeting place for over 50 years.",
    "In 2019, over 2,300 families entered Friendship Park to connect with their loved ones.",
    "The current project slated for Friendship Park is a 30-foot bollard-style Trump wall.",
    "The construction of the border wall project would have detrimental impacts on safety, life, and the environment.",
    "Multiple secure walls are already located at Friendship Park.",
    "No public access is included as part of the wall replacement project at Friendship Park.",
    "Funds used at Friendship Park should protect and enhance the binational relationship rather than build a border wall.",
    "Funds allocated to the border wall project could be used to mitigate the ongoing crisis of transboundary flows of sewage, solid waste, and toxic sediment."
  ]
}
```
